name: voltflow
description: Adaptive TDD, surgical editing, subagent routing, and deployment review gates for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Lean TDD workflow and review gates.
interface.longDescription: VoltFlow scales planning, testing, delegation, and adversarial review to the risk of the change, then guards deployment with a diff-bound review receipt.
defaultPrompt: Prepare this project for deployment with VoltFlow.
